# Model Card: 30-Day Readmission Risk

> **Internal Use Only** · Version 1.2 · Generated 2026-06-01
> · Content hash `97b8fc0fc371`

## Details

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| Model name | 30-Day Readmission Risk |
| Version | 1.2 |
| Model type | Logistic regression |
| Developer | Mountain Region Health — ML Engineering |
| Contact | ml-governance@example.org |
| Last updated | 2026-01-15 |
| FDA regulatory status | Not a medical device |
| HIPAA data classification | PHI (limited data set for development) |

## Purpose

Target finite care-management resources to the highest-risk patients.

**Clinical decision supported:** Prioritization of care-management outreach

## Intended use

**Primary use cases**
- Flag discharges at elevated 30-day readmission risk

**Primary users**
- Care management nurses
- Discharge planners

**Intended care setting**
- Inpatient discharge

**Target patient population:** Adult inpatients at discharge

**Clinical workflow integration:** Score surfaced in the discharge planning worklist

## Out-of-scope and cautioned uses

Not validated for pediatric or obstetric populations.

- Denying care
- Insurance underwriting

## Inputs and outputs

Penalized logistic regression; outputs a 0-1 risk score.

**Inputs used**
- Age
- Prior admissions
- Comorbidity flags
- Primary insurance

**Output used:** Calibrated probability of 30-day all-cause readmission

## Development data

5,000 synthetic patients (Synthea).

**Development dataset demographics**

| Group | Description |
|---|---|
| age | 18-89 |
| sex | 51% F / 49% M |

## Validation and quantitative performance

**External validation process:** Held-out temporal split; recalibrated quarterly.

**Evaluation method:** 5-fold cross-validation with bootstrap CIs.

**Quantitative measures of performance**

| Measure | Value |
|---|---|
| auroc | 0.726 |
| auprc | 0.341 |

**Performance metrics**

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| auroc | 0.726 |
| brier | 0.118 |

## Performance by subgroup (fairness)

**race:Black**

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| auroc | 0.701 |

**race:White**

| Metric | Value |
|---|---|
| auroc | 0.733 |

**Fairness considerations:** AUROC gap across race slices monitored; see fairness report.

## Limitations, safety, and operations

**Known limitations**
- Synthetic training data; not validated on real patients.

**Safety considerations:** Advisory only; never auto-actions care.

**Monitoring plan:** Monthly calibration drift check; quarterly fairness re-evaluation.

**Retirement criteria:** Retire if calibration drift exceeds threshold for two cycles.

**Incident contacts:** ml-governance@example.org; on-call pager 555-0100
